CustomField.description: Human-in-the-Loop mode for this capability. Leave blank to execute immediately without human intervention. Confirmation = LLM asks the user inline before executing (iterative chat executions only). Approval = ALWAYS require formal approval (all strategies). ConfirmationThenApproval = LLM confirms inline, then submits for formal approval (iterative chat executions only). ConditionalApproval = LLM decides whether approval is needed based on context and rules in capability description.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Leave blank for no human check. Confirmation = LLM asks in chat. Approval = always require approval. ConfirmationThenApproval = both (iterative chat only). ConditionalApproval = LLM decides based on context (for example high-value accounts or large amounts).
CustomField.label: HITL Mode
